A real recorded phone call answered by a Plivo voice agent at a dental clinic, shown with its transcript lighting up word by word. The caller asks to reschedule a Friday cleaning; the agent looks up the booking, checks availability, books a new slot, and sends a confirmation text, calling four tools along the way. Press play to hear the recording.

go live steps
Go live with AI agents in minutes
With Plivo's guided setup, you can build, test, and launch production-ready agents - without code or complexity.
01
Vibe Agent
"Build me a customer support agent that handles refund requests. It should ask for the order number, look it up, and process refunds automatically..."

analysis.name: Plivo
analysis.value_proposition: A programmable communications and AI agent platform for building voice, SMS, WhatsApp, and chat AI agents with sub-500ms latency across 150+ countries.
analysis.ideal_customer: Developers and CX/sales teams building voice AI agents and omnichannel messaging apps at scale

Bring your own carrier (BYOC) telephony option

praised: Positioned early as an open-source alternative to Twilio ('Plivo - an opensource alternative to Twilio')
Broad international coverage praised historically ('Plivo makes it to 50 countries in 30 days, outstrips competition')
Used for SIP trunking as landline replacement ('SIP Trunking to Replace My Landline Phone Using Plivo')
Perceived pricing advantage vs Twilio ('Why Plivo Cloud is better than Twilio')
complaints: G2 reviews page was not accessible (content unavailable at scrape time)

free_tier.limits: $10 in free credits, no credit card required

tiers.name: Pay as you go
tiers.headline_inclusions: Usage-priced voice/SMS/WhatsApp/AI agents; $10 free credits; no lock-in

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Starts at $1,000/mo; volume discounts, data residency, compliance, SLA

pricing.notes: Usage-based per-minute/per-message rates. Voice AI agent $0.030/min; AI text conversations $0.005/outcome. Voice: local outbound $0.0115/min, inbound $0.0055/min; toll-free outbound $0.0060/min, inbound $0.0180/min; browser SDK/SIP $0.0033/min. SMS long/short code $0.0077, toll-free $0.0079. WhatsApp: marketing $0.0275/msg, utility/auth $0.0044/msg, service free. Recording storage free first 90 days then $0.0004/min/mo. All voice/AI calls billed in 60-second intervals. Dynamic usage-based discounting rewards higher volume.
